chat.welcome: 👋 Hi! I'm your AI assistant. Ask me anything about the pages you visit, and I'll search and summarize the relevant information for you.
chat.welcomeCurrentPage: 👋 Hi! I'm your AI assistant. Ask me anything about this page, and I'll analyze and summarize the information for you.

settings.title: Settings
settings.mcpAgentPromptsEnabled: Include MCP server prompts in the agent system context (prompts/list + prompts/get once per chat request; size limits apply).
settings.browserAutomationDescription: Allow assistant to click and fill fields on the page
settings.sectionChatDesc: How much history is sent to the model and optional rolling summary of older turns (stored locally).
settings.chatRollingEvery: Run summary every N new messages
settings.sectionAgentDesc: Extra LLM steps (plan / verify) and optional compression of tool output before the main model sees it.
settings.sectionInstructionsDesc: Custom text appended to the system prompt (rules, style, capabilities).
settings.agentQuickHint: Full orchestrator options are in the extension Options page.

options.title: PageAI – Options
options.subtitle: Configure LLM and MCP
options.externalEndpointWarning: Chat and page content will be sent to this server. Continue?
